4th possibility:
Taxi Driver ( D) got correct info. (1) from passenger (P), but added his own interpretation(+) and opinion (+), end up with wrong information.
Result = P(1) -> D (1+)

Characters:
Host ( H) , Driver (D), Passenger (P), Info.(F),
Info: good/ correct/true (1), bad/wrong/fake (0),

Possible Outcome:
1. H(0) = 0 - BAD host
2. H(1) P(1) D(1) = 1 +1 +1 = 3
3. H(1), P(0) D(0) = 1 +0 + 0= 1
4. H(1), P(1), D (1+) = 1+1+ (1+) = 3+

Whoever wrote the post, if YOU ARE SERIOUS, send the info. to AppleDaily, RTHK and all LOCAL mass media!

Taxi Driver ( D) got correct info. (1) from passenger (P), but added his own interpretation(+) and opinion (+), end up with wrong information.
Result = P(1) -> D (1+)

Characters:
Host ( H) , Driver (D), Passenger (P), Info.(F),
Info: good/ correct/true (1), bad/wrong/fake (0),

Possible Outcome:
1. H(0) = 0 - BAD host
2. H(1) P(1) D(1) = 1 +1 +1 = 3
3. H(1), P(0) D(0) = 1 +0 + 0= 1
4. H(1), P(1), D (1+) = 1+1+ (1+) = 3+
